scope.summary: Enumerate ALL public repos from VENDOR_ORGS via GET /orgs/{org}/repos, then per-repo tree scan for SKILL.md

dedup.summary: Use existing DiscoveryRecord-based dedup from github-discovery.ts, with force option

cadence.summary: Every 6 hours scheduled, admin endpoint for on-demand

api.summary: Both scheduled crawl source vendor-org-discovery + dedicated POST /api/v1/admin/discovery/vendor-orgs

rate_limits.summary: Two-phase: list repos paginated, Trees API per-repo. Token rotation. Skip forks and 0-star repos.

pipeline.summary: Submit through /api/v1/submissions/bulk, let submission-scanner handle vendor fast-path
